description: Bid 2D/2H over 1NT to show a 5+ card major and let opener declare
purpose: Right-side the contract so the strong 1NT hand stays hidden, while guaranteeing a trump fit when responder has a 5+ card major

authority.label: ACBL SAYC — Jacoby Transfers are a core SAYC convention, standardized

teaching.tradeoff: Using 2D and 2H as transfers means you can't play in a natural 2D or 2H contract.
teaching.principle: Transfer principle: let the strong hand be declarer to protect tenaces from the opening lead.
commonMistakes: Remember to complete the transfer — after opener bids 2H/2S, you must rebid to show your strength and shape
With exactly 5 cards in the major and invitational values, bid 2NT after the transfer to give opener a choice

explanationEntries.displayText: Eligible for Jacoby Transfer
Transfer is the preferred convention
Transfer target suit determined by longest major
Opener has 3+ hearts to fit responder's suit
explanationEntries.contrastiveDisplayText: Opener lacks heart fit (fewer than 3 hearts)

explanationEntries.displayText: Opener has 3+ spades to fit responder's suit
explanationEntries.contrastiveDisplayText: Opener lacks spade fit (fewer than 3 spades)

explanationEntries.displayText: Transfer to hearts: bid 2♦ to show 5+ hearts
Transfer to spades: bid 2♥ to show 5+ spades
Accept transfer: bid the target major (hearts)
Accept transfer: bid the target major (spades)
Sign off in hearts: weak hand, pass and play in the major
Raise to 4♥: game values with 5+ hearts
Bid 3NT: game values, offers opener choice between 3NT and 4♥
Raise to 3♥: invitational with 6+ hearts, opener decides game
Bid 2NT: invitational with exactly 5 hearts, opener decides
Bid 2♠: invitational with 5 hearts and 5 spades, non-forcing
Bid 3♣: game forcing with 5+ hearts and 4+ clubs
Bid 3♦: game forcing with 5+ hearts and 4+ diamonds
Bid 3♠: singleton/void in spades with slam interest
Bid 4NT: quantitative slam invite in hearts or notrump
Sign off in spades: weak hand, pass and play in the major
Raise to 4♠: game values with 5+ spades
Bid 3NT: game values, offers opener choice between 3NT and 4♠
Raise to 3♠: invitational with 6+ spades, opener decides game
Bid 2NT: invitational with exactly 5 spades, opener decides
Bid 3♣: game forcing with 5+ spades and 4+ clubs
Bid 3♦: game forcing with 5+ spades and 4+ diamonds
Bid 3♥: 5-5 majors with slam interest (stronger than 4♥)
Bid 4♥: game values with 5+ spades and 5+ hearts
Bid 4NT: quantitative slam invite in spades or notrump
Correct to 4♥: opener has 3+ hearts, prefer the major game
Pass 3NT: opener lacks heart fit, stay in notrump
Correct to 4♠: opener has 3+ spades, prefer the major game
Pass 3NT: opener lacks spade fit, stay in notrump
Accept heart invite: bid 4♥ with maximum and heart fit
Accept heart invite: bid 3NT with maximum but no heart fit
Sign off in 3♥: minimum hand but 3+ hearts (fit found)
Decline heart invite: pass 2NT with minimum and no heart fit
Accept spade invite: bid 4♠ with maximum and spade fit
Accept spade invite: bid 3NT with maximum but no spade fit
Sign off in 3♠: minimum hand but 3+ spades (fit found)
Decline spade invite: pass 2NT with minimum and no spade fit
Accept heart invite raise: bid 4♥ with maximum, fit and extras
Decline heart invite raise: pass 3♥ with minimum
Accept spade invite raise: bid 4♠ with maximum, fit and extras
Decline spade invite raise: pass 3♠ with minimum

teachingLabel.name: Transfer to hearts
teachingLabel.summary: Bid 2D to ask opener to bid 2H, keeping the strong hand as declarer

teachingLabel.name: Transfer to spades
teachingLabel.summary: Bid 2H to ask opener to bid 2S, keeping the strong hand as declarer

teachingLabel.name: Accept transfer to hearts
teachingLabel.summary: Complete the transfer by bidding 2H as requested

teachingLabel.name: Accept transfer to spades
teachingLabel.summary: Complete the transfer by bidding 2S as requested

clauses.description: No short suit (balanced enough for NT)
No slam values (game values, not slam (use 4NT for slam invite))
clauses.rationale: game values, not slam (use 4NT for slam invite)

teachingLabel.name: 3NT choice
teachingLabel.summary: Offer opener a choice between 3NT and 4H with exactly 5 balanced hearts

clauses.description: No short suit (balanced enough for NT invite)

teachingLabel.name: 2NT invite
teachingLabel.summary: Invite game with a balanced hand, letting opener choose between 3NT and hearts

teachingLabel.name: Signoff
teachingLabel.summary: Pass to play in 2H with a weak hand, ending the auction

clauses.description: 5+ hearts (game in major with long suit)
clauses.rationale: game in major with long suit

teachingLabel.name: 4H game
teachingLabel.summary: Jump to 4H with game values and 6+ hearts to play in the major

clauses.description: 6+ hearts (invite in major with long suit)
clauses.rationale: invite in major with long suit

teachingLabel.name: 3H invite (6+ hearts)
teachingLabel.summary: Invite game in hearts with 6+ cards and invitational values

teachingLabel.name: 2S invite (5-5 majors)
teachingLabel.summary: Show 5-5 in both majors with invitational values after a heart transfer

teachingLabel.name: 3C game force
teachingLabel.summary: Show a 4+ club side suit with game-forcing values to explore the best contract

teachingLabel.name: 3D game force
teachingLabel.summary: Show a 4+ diamond side suit with game-forcing values to explore the best contract

clauses.description: At most 1 spades (singleton or void in spades)

teachingLabel.name: 3S splinter (slam try)
teachingLabel.summary: Show shortness in spades with slam interest in hearts

teachingLabel.name: 4NT quantitative
teachingLabel.summary: Invite slam with balanced slam values, asking opener to bid 6 with a maximum

clauses.description: No short suit (balanced enough for NT)
No slam values (game values, not slam (use 4NT for slam invite))
clauses.rationale: game values, not slam (use 4NT for slam invite)

teachingLabel.name: 3NT choice
teachingLabel.summary: Offer opener a choice between 3NT and 4S with exactly 5 balanced spades

clauses.description: No short suit (balanced enough for NT invite)

teachingLabel.name: 2NT invite
teachingLabel.summary: Invite game with a balanced hand, letting opener choose between 3NT and spades

teachingLabel.name: Signoff
teachingLabel.summary: Pass to play in 2S with a weak hand, ending the auction

clauses.description: 5+ spades (game in major with long suit)
clauses.rationale: game in major with long suit

teachingLabel.name: 4S game
teachingLabel.summary: Jump to 4S with game values and 6+ spades to play in the major

clauses.description: 6+ spades (invite in major with long suit)
clauses.rationale: invite in major with long suit

teachingLabel.summary: Invite game in spades with 6+ cards and invitational values

teachingLabel.name: 3C game force
teachingLabel.summary: Show a 4+ club side suit with game-forcing values after a spade transfer

teachingLabel.name: 3D game force
teachingLabel.summary: Show a 4+ diamond side suit with game-forcing values after a spade transfer

teachingLabel.name: 3H slam try (5-5 majors)
teachingLabel.summary: Show 5-5 majors with slam interest, distinguishing from a game-only 4H bid

clauses.description: No slam values (game values, not slam (use 3H for slam interest))
clauses.rationale: game values, not slam (use 3H for slam interest)

teachingLabel.name: 4H game (5-5 majors)
teachingLabel.summary: Bid game in hearts with 5-5 majors and game values but no slam interest

teachingLabel.name: 4NT quantitative
teachingLabel.summary: Invite slam with balanced slam values after a spade transfer

teachingLabel.name: 4♥ heart fit
teachingLabel.summary: Correct to 4H with 3+ hearts, choosing the major fit over 3NT

clauses.description: No opener has heart fit (no fit)

teachingLabel.name: Stay in 3NT

definitions.description: Transfer target suit (hearts, spades, or none)
Eligible for Jacoby transfer (5+ card major)
Opener has 3+ hearts (fit with responder's 5-card suit)
Opener has 3+ spades (fit with responder's 5-card suit)
